rows.notes: Clear page year at top centre, no monetary columns on this line.
Clear centred title under the year; structural heading introducing the list.
Pounds two digits (66) and shillings/pence alignment consistent with column lines; ink a little light at pence, could be 6 or 8 but 6 chosen based on vertical alignment with other rows.
Three-digit pound amount read as '373' (the leftmost of the three pound digits is faint). Shillings '8' and pence '6' align well; slight uncertainty on first pound digit due to faint stroke.
Pound figure '234' obviously three digits; shillings '8' and pence '6' are clearly formed and align with ruling lines. Values pass currency ranges.
Small pounds figure '7' with clear shillings '4' and pence '6'. Slight ink irregularity around description but amounts are unambiguous.
This line appears as a section label followed by numbered sub-lines below; no monetary amounts on this line.

Description shows the two components 105.0.0 and 17.3.0; total recorded in right-hand columns as 122 pounds 3s 0d. The arithmetic and alignment are consistent; some letters in description are faint but numbers are clear.
Description lists 91.10.0 and 13.18.6; these sum to 105.8.6 which is what appears in the amount columns. Handwriting of 'Local Rate' is slanted but numeric parts are legible.
Line explicitly states 'Nil' for item 3; no monetary amount present.
Description legible; there is no amount recorded on the same line (small dot only). Appears to be a sub-item without its own sum.
Pounds '43' clearly written in the pounds column; shillings and pence are zero (two small dots/zeros visible). Description is legible.

rows.description: Int on £57.10 at 3 pr ct: 1:14:4 by Relton
rows.notes: Interest expression '1:14:4' visible in description and a matching small amount shows in the columns. Some ink smearing around the description; chosen 1/14/4 since this matches the stated rate on £57.10 at 3% (approx).

Description explicitly lists '2.10.0' and a corresponding amount is visible in the columns. There is slight ambiguity because there are multiple nearby small amounts; chosen values match the textual repayment figure.

rows.description: Int on £100 at 4 per cent Augt 18-1881 by Do
rows.notes: Interest on £100 at 4% is £4.00. The '4 0 0' in the amount columns is clearly written and aligned with the line.

rows.description: Int on £150 at Do to April 1, 1880 by Do
rows.notes: Interest on £150 at 4% is £6.00; '6 0 0' is clearly visible and aligned with the line.

Amount column shows '13 2 10' aligned with this description. The description word before 'Prize' is somewhat faded and could be 'late' or 'latee', but the numeric amount is clear enough though slightly smudged.

rows.description: Int for one yr. to Domus for £500 by Burrar
rows.notes: Interest on £500 at 3% = £15.00. The '15 0 0' in the columns is clear and neatly written; description reading of names is slightly uncertain but does not affect amount.

Amount appears as '14 4 3' but digits in pence column are slightly smudged and could be 1–2 pence different. Description is partially crossed/ink-blotted; chosen values follow visible strokes but have moderate ambiguity.
Description likely 'Bouse Register' or 'Burse Register'; amount '10 0 0' is plainly written. Minor uncertainty in the first word of description but amount clear.
Amount printed as '122.15.0' in the description area and also registered in the columns; alignment and digits are clear.
Clear '93.3.4' figure written next to the line and aligns with the amount columns; description 'Richards' readable.
Amount '46.19.8' clearly visible and perfectly within currency ranges; surname in description slightly stylised but readable.

rows.description: Stock of the three funds sold
rows.notes: Large pounds figure is either '5067' or '6067' — the leftmost digit is faint. Shillings and pence '17.4' are clear. Chose 5067 based on stroke width similarity to nearby '5' shapes; moderate uncertainty on the leading digit.
Amount '347.4.0' is plainly written and aligned with the amount columns; description is legible.
Description word(s) before 'College' are partly faded ('Sejbones' is a best reading); amount '10 0 0' is clearly written. Moderate uncertainty on spelling only.
Amount '25 0 0' clearly in columns. The names in description are partially unclear (handwriting cramped); amount assignment is confident.
Short description 'Boase Register' (or 'Bause') but amount '2 0 0' is clearly shown in the columns.
Description likely 'Clutter-book' or 'Clutter-bunk' for 'William Road'; amount '10 0 0' is clear. Minor uncertainty only in spelling of description.

Final bottom-right aggregate reads as '3390 0 4' (pounds 3390, 0s, 4d). Digits are fairly clear though the first digit could possibly be a '3' or '2' in heavy ink; chosen 3390 as best reading of the grouped total at page bottom.
